description_long: This is a compact, black submachine gun with a sleek, modern design, reminiscent of the iconic Heckler & Koch MP5. The rifle features a metal receiver and barrel assembly, a polymer pistol grip, and a curved detachable magazine. The stock is a minimalist, retractable metal type, allowing for easy storage and maneuverability in tight urban environments. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights and a short barrel, with a simple muzzle end and no visible suppressor or compensator. The overall finish is matte black, with subtle metallic highlights on the moving parts and controls.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a retractable stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, retractable stock extended, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, slim profile, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and receiver details, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, pistol grip, and the rear sight alignment.
